name: table
label: Relationship table
description: Edge table where each record is a relationship, e.g. 'cmdb_rel_ci'.

name: filter
label: Filter (encoded query)
description: Optional encoded query to scope the relationships, e.g. by relationship type.

name: sourceField
label: Source reference field
description: Reference field for the link source, e.g. 'parent'. Its sys_id becomes the node id, its display value the label.

name: targetField
label: Target reference field
description: Reference field for the link target, e.g. 'child'.

name: sourceGroupField
label: Source group field (optional)
description: Dot-walked field giving the source node's category for colouring, e.g. 'parent.sys_class_name'.

name: targetGroupField
label: Target group field (optional)
description: Dot-walked field giving the target node's category, e.g. 'child.sys_class_name'.

name: linkValueField
label: Link value field (optional)
description: Numeric field weighting each link (drives link width when sizing by value). Blank = 1 per relationship.

name: useDisplayValue
label: Use display values for labels
description: Label nodes by the reference field's display value (readable) instead of the raw value.
